blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
